phases.title: PHASE 1 Requirements Identification and Team Building

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: - **Business Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with the organization, processes, and decision-making chains of the business work related to this case; skilled in communication; familiar with basic project management operations
- **Product Manager (x1)**: Typically the product owner of the video recording functionality; skilled in communication; assists the business liaison in technical-level communication
- **Business-side Technical Liaison (x1)**: Typically the technical lead of the video recording functionality; supports the business liaison in technical-level communication

- **Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Familiar with industry-standard technical architectures, processes, construction, and planning related to this business case; skilled in communication; has strong execution capability

subsections.title: Implementation Steps
content: 1. Business liaison, product manager, and algorithm liaison conduct initial requirement discussions and brainstorming sessions to identify core requirements of this case
2. Business liaison and algorithm liaison form a working group and communication channel, clarifying the liaisons and contact methods

3. Business liaison, together with the product manager (with support from business-side technical liaison when necessary), clearly describes the content and effect plan of the target video to the algorithm liaison in text format
4. Both parties communicate and supplement other materials needed for requirement confirmation, such as video scripts, copywriting, visual materials, etc.
5. Algorithm liaison conducts requirement assessment based on meeting notes and provided documents and materials from both parties

subsections.title: Related Resources
content: - Mind mapping tools: https://xmind.cn/ or Feishu Docs "Canvas" and "Mind Map" features
- Script and copywriting tools: Word, Excel, WPS, etc.

subsections.title: Deliverables
content: 1. Establish working group, clarify liaisons and contact methods
2. Complete project cooperation requirement form (i.e., target video plan), with preliminary organization of requirements

subsections.title: Timeline
content: 1-2 days

phases.title: PHASE 2 Value Confirmation and Requirements Refinement

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: - **Business Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
- **Business Expert (x1)**: Leader, executor, or expert involved in core business modules related to this case; assists the business liaison in clarifying business pain points and values
- **Product Manager (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
- **Business-side Technical Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
- **Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1

subsections.title: Implementation Steps
content: 1. Business liaison communicates with their business experts and related teams to confirm expected goals and business value of this solution implementation; business value should be quantified as much as possible with comparative data (such as current numbers, expected targets, expected improvement compared to current status, etc.)
2. Algorithm liaison communicates with their algorithm experts and related teams to list items pending confirmation, while conducting preliminary research, assessment, and design of the solution

3. Product manager communicates with business liaison and algorithm liaison to clarify requirements, then organizes relevant personnel from both parties to write the preliminary verification requirements document
4. Both parties confirm requirements based on the preliminary verification requirements document, and plan schedule, budget, and resources according to confirmed requirements
5. Repeat the above steps until the preliminary verification requirements document is finalized

subsections.title: Related Resources
content: - Template: [Preliminary Verification Requirements Document Template](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/PC8FwObgwiMwVPkM0i4cYkr2nYf?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: Deliverables
content: 1. Preliminary verification requirements document: should include clear requirements, planning, and presentation effects of the target video
2. Delivery confirmation items, such as start time, acceptance time, acceptance plan, etc.

subsections.title: Timeline
content: 5-1 day

phases.title: PHASE 3 Preliminary Verification and Project Initiation

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: - **Business Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
- **Product Manager (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1
- **Algorithm Liaison (x1)**: Same as PHASE 1

- **Algorithm Engineer (x1)**: Proficient in at least one backend programming language (such as Python, etc.); familiar with Docker; proficient in private deployment of common agent platforms (such as Dify, etc.), large model configuration, MCP tool service configuration; has some understanding of frontend operations

subsections.title: Implementation Steps
content: 1. Resource preparation and environment configuration
2. Claude Code installation and configuration
3. Build and start ffmpeg-mcp service
4. Build and start funasr-mcp service
5. Build and start paddle-speech-tts-mcp service
6. Build custom MCP service for video compression ratio calculation and start it
7. Configure and start song-generation service to support text-to-instrumental-music generation
8. Start Claude Code to call the MCP services mentioned in the above steps to generate introduction video
9. Algorithm liaison writes preliminary verification report
10. Algorithm liaison completes video production
11. Business liaison and product manager accept the video (first acceptance can serve as PoC)
12. Business liaison, product manager, and algorithm liaison repeat 2-3 rounds of feedback and modification optimization
13. Complete acceptance

14. If planning to officially release the project, both parties closely negotiate, adjust the plan based on demo effects, finalize the project initiation report, and prepare project initiation agreement and launch matters

subsections.title: Related Resources
content: - Claude Code GitHub: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
- mcp-python-sdk GitHub: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk
- ffmpeg Official: https://www.ffmpeg.org/
- ffmpeg GitHub: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg
- ffmpeg-python GitHub: https://github.com/kkroening/ffmpeg-python
- loguru GitHub: https://github.com/Delgan/loguru
- mcp-python-sdk GitHub: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk
- funasr GitHub: https://github.com/modelscope/FunASR
- paddle-speech GitHub: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleSpeech
- SongGeneration GitHub: https://github.com/tencent-ailab/SongGeneration
- Template: [Preliminary Verification Report Template](https://gvxnc4ekbvn.feishu.cn/wiki/HKZGwXetBije9HklRQmcAe94nZE?from=from_copylink)

subsections.title: Deliverables
content: 1. Finalized and delivered preliminary verification report
2. Completed video
3. Project initiation report
4. Project initiation agreement (appendix should include delivery, acceptance, schedule, resources, etc. for the official release version)

subsections.title: Timeline
content: 5-9.5 days

phases.title: PHASE 4 Official Launch and Iterative Optimization

subsections.title: Team Composition
content: - Determined according to the project initiation report

subsections.title: Implementation Steps
content: 1. Complete official project initiation, determine start time
2. Implement and deliver according to project initiation report content and schedule plan
3. Review and accept according to project initiation report goals and processes
4. Operate and iterate according to project initiation report planning
5. Complete project closure according to project initiation report planning and agreement terms

subsections.title: Deliverables
content: 1. All materials mutually agreed upon by both parties throughout the project lifecycle
2. Officially launched product

subsections.title: Timeline
content: 3-6 months (varies depending on specific circumstances)
